midi_file.note_on_key: MIDI metadata says C but piece is in Bb minor / D minor depending on edition

musical_notes.actual_key: Bb minor (opening Lento), Bb major (Friss) — common performance key

sections.name: Lento
sections.description: Slow opening theme, Sul G marking on violin
sections.performance_marking: Sul G — entire section played on G string

sections.name: Transition / Cadenza
sections.description: Ascending scale run leaving Sul G range, arpeggios

sections.name: Vivace / Friss
sections.description: Fast csárdás dance section, 16th-note runs and arpeggios

dynamics.note: MIDI velocities approximate dynamics; Sul G section tends toward mp–mf, Friss toward f–ff

G.description: Sul G hard constraint — notes 0–55 forced to G string only
